parts.answer: Human: detected by retina / light receptors; involves neurones / nervous system / electrical impulses; response is muscular contractions (in iris); causing constriction / reduction in size of the pupil; Plants: detected by stem tip; involves hormones / auxin; more moves / diffuses to the side away from light; causing more growth / elongation + on the shaded side; positive phototropism / plant stem grows/bends + towards the light; Max 6
transmission of impulse between neurones; in one direction; neurotransmitter; released (from vesicles) into (synaptic) gap; diffusion + across gap; binds with receptor (proteins); Max 4
